name: "[EN] Bug Report"

title: "[Bug] A one-sentence summary of this issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
type: Bug

---

## Pre-submission Checklist
- [ ] I have confirmed that this issue has not been reported yet.
- [ ] I have confirmed that this issue can be reliably reproduced.
- [ ] This issue affects my experience.
- [ ] This issue is not within the intended scope of Astratch.

## What Happened
Describe the behavior of this bug...

## What Should Have Happened
Describe the expected behavior in your view.

## How Did I Trigger It?
Step by step, tell us how you triggered this bug:

1. Pressed...
2. Saw... at...
3. Then clicked...
4. Found... issue occurred

## What Does It Look Like (Optional)
Attach screenshots or videos here to help us see the bug clearly.

## Device
- Your operating system: [e.g. Windows 11 25H2]
- Your browser: [e.g. Microsoft Edge 150.0.4.4078.83]

## Additional Information
Add any other details about this issue here
